query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.orderNumber IS NOT NULL AND a.orderNumber != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as log_has_orderNumber,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.totalAmount IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as log_has_totalAmount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.storeName IS NOT NULL AND a.storeName != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as log_has_storeName,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND a.imageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as log_has_imageUrl
FROM ai_auto_review_logs a
WHERE a.isDryRun = 0
LIMIT 1;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.orderNumber IS NOT NULL AND a.orderNumber != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as log_has_orderNumber,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.totalAmount IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as log_has_totalAmount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.storeName IS NOT NULL AND a.storeName != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as log_has_storeName,
  SUM(CASE WHEN a.imageUrl IS NOT NULL AND a.imageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as log_has_imageUrl
FROM ai_auto_review_logs a
WHERE a.isDryRun = 0
LIMIT 1;
